prompt: A misty mountain path with worn stone steps ascending through dense fog. Ancient gnarled pine trees with twisted branches emerge from white clouds on the left side. A distant monastery with a traditional curved roof is barely visible through the mountain mist in the background. Rocky outcroppings and sparse grass line the path edges. Monochrome black-and-white ink-wash atmosphere. To the right, a steep cliff drops away revealing layered mountain ridges dissolving into white mist, with a waterfall cascading down a distant rock face. Further right, a weathered stone stele with carved calligraphy stands beside a gnarled pine. Behind the viewer to the right, a small stone pavilion with a curved roof offers a resting point overlooking the cloud-filled valley below. First-person viewer. First-person view looking upward along the stone steps toward the misty monastery. No held objects.

A distant monastery with a traditional curved roof is barely visible through the mountain mist in the background. Rocky outcroppings and sparse grass line the path edges. The scene has a monochrome black-and-white ink-wash atmosphere.

Behind the viewer to the right, a small stone pavilion with a curved roof offers a resting point overlooking the cloud-filled valley below.
